nameEn: International Symposium on Theoretical Aspects of Computer Science
description: A French-German theoretical CS conference covering algorithms, complexity theory, automata, and logic across all areas of TCS. STACS is among the most important European TCS venues after ICALP and alternates annually between France and Germany. It was a pioneer in open-access publication through LIPIcs.
descriptionKo: 프랑스-독일 협력으로 시작된 이론 CS 학회로, 알고리즘, 복잡도 이론, 오토마타, 논리학 등 TCS 전반을 다룹니다. 유럽 TCS 커뮤니티에서 ICALP 다음으로 중요한 학회 중 하나이며, 매년 프랑스와 독일을 번갈아 개최합니다. LIPIcs를 통한 오픈 액세스 출판을 선도한 학회이기도 합니다.
descriptionEn: A French-German theoretical CS conference covering algorithms, complexity theory, automata, and logic across all areas of TCS. STACS is among the most important European TCS venues after ICALP and alternates annually between France and Germany. It was a pioneer in open-access publication through LIPIcs.
